# ETSO

ETSO is a research infrastructure for computational authorship attribution and textual exploration of Spanish Golden Age theatre. It provides stylometric authorship reports, TEXORO full-corpus textual search, BITESO digital texts, automatic plot summaries, author and work records, and research documentation.

Primary domain: https://etso.es/

## Main Language Entry Points

- Spanish: https://etso.es/
- English: https://etso.es/en
- French: https://etso.es/fr
- Portuguese: https://etso.es/pt
- Italian: https://etso.es/it
- German: https://etso.es/de
- Chinese: https://etso.es/zh
- Japanese: https://etso.es/ja
- Korean: https://etso.es/ko
- Russian: https://etso.es/ru
- Arabic: https://etso.es/ar

## Core Pages

- Examen de autorías: https://etso.es/examen-autorias
- TEXORO textual search: https://etso.es/texoro
- BITESO digital texts: https://etso.es/biteso
- Automatic summaries: https://etso.es/resumenes
- 3D work network: https://etso.es/red-obras
- How to cite ETSO: https://etso.es/como-citarnos
- Automatic transcriptions: https://etso.es/transcripciones-automaticas
- Team: https://etso.es/equipo
- Contact: https://etso.es/contacto

## Multilingual Core Pages

- English Examen de autorías: https://etso.es/en/examen-autorias
- English TEXORO: https://etso.es/en/texoro
- English BITESO: https://etso.es/en/biteso
- English summaries: https://etso.es/en/resumenes
- French Examen de autorías: https://etso.es/fr/examen-autorias
- French TEXORO: https://etso.es/fr/texoro
- French BITESO: https://etso.es/fr/biteso
- French summaries: https://etso.es/fr/resumenes

- Portuguese TEXORO: https://etso.es/pt/texoro

- Italian TEXORO: https://etso.es/it/texoro
- Italian BITESO: https://etso.es/it/biteso
- Italian summaries: https://etso.es/it/resumenes
- German Examen de autorías: https://etso.es/de/examen-autorias
- German TEXORO: https://etso.es/de/texoro

- Japanese TEXORO: https://etso.es/ja/texoro
- Japanese BITESO: https://etso.es/ja/biteso

- Korean Examen de autorías: https://etso.es/ko/examen-autorias
- Korean TEXORO: https://etso.es/ko/texoro
- Korean BITESO: https://etso.es/ko/biteso
- Korean summaries: https://etso.es/ko/resumenes
- Russian Examen de autorías: https://etso.es/ru/examen-autorias
- Russian TEXORO: https://etso.es/ru/texoro

- Arabic TEXORO: https://etso.es/ar/texoro
- Arabic BITESO: https://etso.es/ar/biteso
- Arabic summaries: https://etso.es/ar/resumenes

## Crawl And Indexing Notes

- The canonical sitemap index is https://etso.es/sitemap.xml.
- Localized versions are exposed with hreflang in page HTML and XML sitemaps.
- Page framework text is translated; quotations, work titles, author names, and source data may remain in Spanish when they are corpus data rather than interface text.
- Primary citation page: https://etso.es/como-citarnos.
